dataIdInfo.idCredit: Monterey County, California. (2015). Monterey Peninsula Regional Park District, Monterey County, California, 2015. Monterey County, Ca. Available at: http://purl.stanford.edu/ct015sr6696.

idCitation.collTitle: Monterey County, California: GIS Maps and Data
idCitation.resTitle: Monterey Peninsula Regional Park District, Monterey County, California, 2015

LegConsts.othConsts: No restrictions on access or use.
LegConsts.useLimit: This GIS data is provided "AS IS." The County of Monterey (COUNTY) makes no warranties, express or implied, including without limitation, any implied warranties of merchantability and/or fitness for a particular purpose, regarding the accuracy, completeness, value, quality, validity, merchantability, suitability, and/or condition, of the GIS data. The COUNTY also specifically does not guarantee that the information is free from harmful effects or viruses and that it will not harm the users’ computer. By using this GIS, users accept sole responsibility for ensuring the protection of their own computer equipment and specifically hold COUNTY harmless from any damage or liability that might ensue do the use of the data. Users of COUNTY's GIS data are hereby notified that current public primary information sources should be consulted for verification of the data and information contained herein. Since the GIS data is dynamic, it will by its nature be inconsistent with the official COUNTY assessment roll file, surveys, maps and/or other documents produced by the County Office of the Assessor, the County Surveyor, and/or other relevant County Offices. Any use of COUNTY's GIS data is done exclusively at the risk of the party making such use.

aggrDSName.resTitle: Monterey County, California: GIS Maps and Data

dataIdInfo.idPurp: This dataset is intended for researchers, students, and policy makers for reference and mapping purposes, and may be used for basic applications such as viewing, querying, and map output production, or to provide a basemap to support graphical overlays and analysis with other spatial data.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: This polygon shapefile contains the boundary of the Monterey Peninsula Regional Park District in Monterey County, California. This layer is part of a collection of GIS data for Monterey County in California.
dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.3.1.4959

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
